title: BEM-541.2 provider selection audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
cycle = 'bem541-provider-selection-audit'

# Read last provider probe/selection from provider state, then create mandatory audit record.
provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text()) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}
last_probe = provider_state.get('last_provider_probe')
last_selection = provider_state.get('last_provider_selection')

missing = []
if not last_probe: missing.append('last_provider_probe')
if not last_selection: missing.append('last_provider_selection')

provider_selection_audit = {
  'record_type':'provider_selection_audit',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal_auditor',
  'from_role':'auditor',
  'to_role':'curator',
  'status':'completed' if not missing else 'failed',
  'decision':'PROVIDER_SELECTION_AUDITED' if not missing else 'PROVIDER_SELECTION_MISSING_EVIDENCE',
  'selected_provider': None if not last_selection else last_selection.get('selected_provider'),
  'reserve_used': None if not last_selection else last_selection.get('reserve_used'),
  'reason': None if not last_selection else last_selection.get('reason'),
  'evidence_paths': ['governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_probe_actual.json','governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_selection_actual.json'],
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/provider_selection_audit.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None if not missing else {'code':'PROVIDER_SELECTION_EVIDENCE_MISSING','missing':missing},
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:23 (UTC+3)'
}

base.joinpath('provider_selection_audit.json').write_text(json.dumps(provider_selection_audit, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(provider_selection_audit, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

provider_state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:23 (UTC+3)'
provider_state['last_provider_selection_audit'] = provider_selection_audit
provider_state['silent_switch_allowed'] = False
provider_state['audit_required_for_provider_selection'] = True
provider_state['blocker'] = provider_selection_audit['blocker']
provider_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(provider_state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem541_2_provider_selection_audit.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-541.2 | Provider Selection Audit Record | ' + ('PASS' if provider_selection_audit['blocker'] is None else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:23 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\nКаждый выбор провайдера теперь требует audit record с evidence_path и reason.\n\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| selected_provider | ' + str(provider_selection_audit.get('selected_provider')) + ' | from last_provider_selection |\n| reserve_used | ' + str(provider_selection_audit.get('reserve_used')) + ' | reserve cannot be silent |\n| reason | ' + str(provider_selection_audit.get('reason')) + ' | explicit decision reason |\n| evidence_paths | ' + ', '.join(provider_selection_audit['evidence_paths']) + ' | probe and selection artifacts |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if provider_selection_audit['blocker'] is None else json.dumps(provider_selection_audit['blocker'], ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem541_2_provider_selection_audit.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-541.2 ' + ('PASS' if provider_selection_audit['blocker'] is None else 'BLOCKER') + ': provider selection audit record appended.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(base/'provider_selection_audit.json'), str(transport), str(provider_state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-541.2 provider selection audit record created')
"""
No issue comments.
